calendar.matters:
Petition Under Probate Code 850 For Order Determining Payments Re Fire Damage On Trust Real Property Is Property Of The Doris J. Middleton And George
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Verleana Green, Esq., for Doris Middleton, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel confirms that decedent only had two (2) children and no predeceased children with issue. The court confirms with counsel that a corrected proof of service, including information on how to appear remotely, was filed.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
